task_completion.description: Navigate to the Week Off configuration module in AttendHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM application window is open, and the 'Week Off' or 'Weekly Off' configuration screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Name the new configuration 'Manufacturing Wing A'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Manufacturing Wing A' is entered into the name or description field for the new Week Off configuration.

task_completion.description: Set Sunday as an off day for all weeks (1st-5th).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the weekly off grid or settings, Sunday is checked or marked as 'Off' or 'Non-Working' for weeks 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5.

task_completion.description: Set Saturday as an off day for the 2nd and 4th weeks only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the weekly off grid or settings, Saturday is checked or marked as 'Off' for week 2 and week 4, but left unchecked/working for weeks 1, 3, and 5.

task_completion.description: Ensure Monday through Friday are set as working days for all weeks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday are NOT marked as off days for any of the weeks (1st-5th).

task_completion.description: Save the new Week Off configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration 'Manufacturing Wing A' appears in the saved list or summary table of Week Off configurations within AttendHRM.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the AttendHRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the AttendHRM application interface being clicked and typed into, rather than a database client (like Firebird ISQL), script, or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock up the answer in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration is seen inside the actual AttendHRM software, not written out in Notepad, Word, or a similar text editor.

integrity.description: The configuration was genuinely saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A confirmation dialog or the appearance of the new entry in the application's list view confirms the save action, rather than just filling out a form without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target configuration name: 'Manufacturing Wing A'. Expected patterns (where 1=Off, 0=Working): Sunday [1, 1, 1, 1, 1], Saturday [0, 1, 0, 1, 0], Monday-Friday [0, 0, 0, 0, 0]. The software used must be AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS).
